title: A Chaotic Voyage Toward Zou
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on a chaotic voyage toward zou within the Weevil, the Barto Club, and the Road to Zou storyline.
scene: The Straw Hats rely on Bartolomeo's chaotic crew while the wider world introduces Weevil and pushes the voyage toward Zou.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The crew heads for 2011! What awaits - them there!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh my... they're huge! Watch out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's Hailing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And each is the size of my head!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WAAH! It's punched a hole in the deck!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo Pirates
dialogue.text: Luffy-senpai! Everyone! Please, go below deck!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you talking about!? We'll help you!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo Pirates
dialogue.text: Which way should we tack!? Who's your navigator!? Tell us what to do!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo Pirates
dialogue.text: Ah, we actually don't have a Navigator.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You do know that this is the new world, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We're just a small back-alley gang, and...

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo Pirates
dialogue.text: Hello, Grammy? It's gambeer! No, it's just that it's hailing something terrible, and...

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo Pirates
dialogue.text: Whenever we're in a pinch, we just call Grammy on the Den-den mushi!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see! So you consult with someone that knows their way about the seas! Well, whatever works. Just hurry!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo Pirates
dialogue.text: Alright boys, I've got it! You know those gum pieces stuck to the deck?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah! We've never been able to do anything about 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Well if we wrap these hail pieces in some cloth, and use 'em to freeze the gum,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: They'll come off in a snap!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We don't need housekeeping tips right now, for crying out loud!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Gyaah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Oh shit! He's out cold!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She also says we should try rubbing some sugar into our warts!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Enough with the Martha Stewart crap!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: That's it! We're sunk! Nami, save us!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: of all the ships to go on, we just had to pick this one!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've just gotta get our hands dirty a bit, that's all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: (i) a

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If only this thing was equipped the way the sunny is!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Are these guys for real...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: UFUFU! How exciting.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's start with you throwing up some barriers.

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo Pirates
dialogue.text: But Grammy says...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is a sin to defy the will of nature!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If it scares you that much then go back to your shitty back water alley!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo Pirates
dialogue.text: Boys! As long as the fearless Straw Hats are with us, we have nothing or no one to fear!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe you idiots actually made it this far!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sir, the [A.O. Pirates] who once served under the former "Whitebeard" pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Have been ann childhood!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: him again, I take it?

dialogue.speaker: Edward Weevil
dialogue.text: Yes, the Warlord "Edward Weevil"!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So then... how many of the ship captains that served under Whitebeard does this make now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: This is the 16th sir...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: They all follow the same pattern... it starts as some petty argument or dispute and ends with an entire city being laid to waste.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The death toll is approximately 600...

dialogue.speaker: Marine officer
dialogue.text: I apologize if im out of order sir but... With the great amount of civilian casualties that always follow in his wake...

dialogue.speaker: Marine officer
dialogue.text: Even as a "Warlord", is it really okay for us to turn a blind eye to his actions...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: A problem indeed..

dialogue.speaker: Miss Bakkin
dialogue.text: The title of the true son of White- beard, Edward Newgate, is a powerful one sir...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But there are many out there that doubt its validity...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...mmm~ for the time being, the authenticity of that claim means very little from where we're standing.

summary: A Chaotic Voyage Toward Zou: The Straw Hats struggle aboard Bartolomeo's ship while Edward Weevil and Miss Bakkin enter the story, and the crew follows the Vivre Card toward Zou.
